name: Probability
description: Random variables, distributions, expectation, and the law of large numbers.

name: Linear Algebra & Applications
description: Matrices, vector spaces, eigenvalues, and linear transformations with data science applications.

name: Advanced Multivariable Calculus
description: Partial derivatives, multiple integrals, and vector calculus with physical rigor.

name: Data Structures & Algorithms
description: Trees, heaps, graphs, and dynamic programming — time and space complexity throughout.

name: Intro to Computer Systems
description: Architecture, memory, assembly, and hands-on C programming.

name: Applied Machine Learning
description: Regression, classification, and clustering with scikit-learn and real-world datasets.

name: Information and the Internet
description: Technical, social, and political dimensions of information in the internet age.

name: Computer Network Architecture
description: Networking layers, protocols, TCP/IP, and socket programming.

name: Discrete Mathematics for Computation
description: Logic, sets, combinatorics, graph theory, and proof techniques for algorithmic reasoning.

name: Machine Learning & Data Mining
description: Modern ML algorithms, supervised and unsupervised learning, and model evaluation in Python.

name: Design & Analysis of Algorithms
description: Efficient algorithm design including divide-and-conquer, dynamic programming, graph algorithms, randomization, and NP-completeness.

name: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence
description: Algorithms and representations for intelligent systems — search, game trees, Bayesian networks, reinforcement learning, and machine learning.
